source: privacy-sanitized Agent CLI Mirror session telemetry captured after EVO-035
failure_definition: the first event whose state is FAIL
recovery_definition: the next chronological full-loop session with no FAIL event and a terminal ROOT OK event
insufficient_support_rule: Report observed behavior but reject natural failure/recovery promotion when episode support is below five.
claim_boundary: A preregistered local incident audit does not establish general failure sensitivity, production safety, or autonomous intervention authority.
